negative_invariants.N1: TravelerState mutation must only appear inside applyReducer
negative_invariants.N2: Projection functions must not read Entity/scene state as input
negative_invariants.N3: Events must not carry implicit temporal context (Date, UUID at emission)
negative_invariants.N4: Reducer must not emit events, call send(), or trigger async work

conformance_axes.A_vs_B: bifurcation: commit_A ≠ commit_B (ascension flip from TravelerState only)
conformance_axes.C: determinism: identical events → identical state commit
conformance_axes.D: idempotency: re-entry of visited nodes leaves state unchanged

run_proves.A: ascension branch: commit_A ≠ commit_B (bifurcation from TravelerState.ascension only)
run_proves.B: creation branch: commit_B ≠ commit_A; same journey, different choice
run_proves.C: determinism replay: identical events → commit_C == commit_A
run_proves.D: idempotency: re-entry of visited nodes → commit_D == commit_A (state unchanged)
